title: Carla Hoffman
compiled_truth: Carla Hoffman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-09 to 2001-07-26), Carla Hoffman sent 68 and received 343 emails, totalling 411 interactions.
